mapper.select: SELECT u.user_id, u.login_id, u.password, u.nickname, u.email, u.social_type, u.social_id, u.status, u.region_id, r.region_name, u.email_verified, u.created_at, u.updated_at FROM tb_user u LEFT JOIN tb_region r ON u.region_id = r.region_id WHERE u.login_id = #{loginId} AND u.is_deleted = 0
SELECT user_id, login_id, email, email_verify_code, email_verify_expiry, email_verified FROM tb_user WHERE email = #{email} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_user WHERE login_id = #{loginId} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_user WHERE email = #{email} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_user (login_id, password, nickname, email, social_type, status, email_verified, created_by, updated_by) VALUES (#{loginId}, #{password}, #{nickname}, #{email}, 'NONE', 'ACTIVE', 'N', 'system', 'system')
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_user SET region_id = #{regionId}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT profile_image, profile_image_type FROM tb_user WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_user SET email_verify_code = #{code}, email_verify_expiry = #{expiry}, email_verified = 'N', updated_at = NOW() WHERE email = #{email} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE tb_user SET email_verified = 'Y', email_verify_code = NULL, email_verify_expiry = NULL, updated_at = NOW() WHERE email = #{email} AND is_deleted = 0
